repo_candidates.title: annsonic/Steel_defect
repo_candidates.abstract: Exercise: Use YOLO to detect hot-rolled steel strip surface defects (NEU-DET dataset).

github.name: Steel_defect
github.description: Exercise: Use YOLO to detect hot-rolled steel strip surface defects (NEU-DET dataset).

repo_candidates.title: Kshitij0605/Steel-Defect-Detection-using-Yolo-models
repo_candidates.abstract: Steel Surface Defect Detection using YOLOv5, YOLOv8, and YOLOv9-e. This project compares three object detection models on the NEU-DET dataset to identify and localize industrial defects such as scratches, inclusions, and patches, optimized for high accuracy and fast inference.

github.name: Steel-Defect-Detection-using-Yolo-models
github.description: Steel Surface Defect Detection using YOLOv5, YOLOv8, and YOLOv9-e. This project compares three object detection models on the NEU-DET dataset to identify and localize industrial defects such as scratches, inclusions, and patches, optimized for high accuracy and fast inference.

repo_candidates.title: xgli411/HE-LightYOLO
repo_candidates.abstract: An efficient and lightweight detection network for steel surface defects

github.name: HE-LightYOLO
github.description: An efficient and lightweight detection network for steel surface defects

repo_candidates.title: luansiting/Steel-Surface-Defect-Detection-System--YOLOv8
repo_candidates.abstract: Industrial steel surface defect detection system based on YOLOv8. Solves small target detection and data scarcity in production lines. Includes data preprocessing, model training, and real-time inference workflows.

github.name: Steel-Surface-Defect-Detection-System--YOLOv8
github.description: Industrial steel surface defect detection system based on YOLOv8. Solves small target detection and data scarcity in production lines. Includes data preprocessing, model training, and real-time inference workflows.

repo_candidates.title: tyqyb/YoloProject
repo_candidates.abstract: Detection of surface defects in steel

github.name: YoloProject
github.description: Detection of surface defects in steel

repo_candidates.title: koyoka361/Steel-Defect-Detection-With-Yolov8
repo_candidates.abstract: A comprehensive steel surface defect detection system using YOLOv8, supporting both local training and cloud-based training on AutoDL.

github.name: Steel-Defect-Detection-With-Yolov8
github.description: A comprehensive steel surface defect detection system using YOLOv8, supporting both local training and cloud-based training on AutoDL.

repo_candidates.title: Beshoy-Nagy/Steel-Surface-Defect-Detection-YOLO
repo_candidates.abstract: A Computer Vision project for detecting and classifying steel surface defects using YOLO and Streamlit. The system identifies six types of defects, provides real-time predictions, and visualizes detection results through an interactive web interface.

github.name: Steel-Surface-Defect-Detection-YOLO
github.description: A Computer Vision project for detecting and classifying steel surface defects using YOLO and Streamlit. The system identifies six types of defects, provides real-time predictions, and visualizes detection results through an interactive web interface.

repo_candidates.title: halosnoopy/A-YOLOv5s-based-Steel-Surface-Defects-Detector
repo_candidates.abstract: A computer vision project implementing the YOLOv5s model for detecting and classifying steel surface defects using the NEU-DET dataset. Includes dataset preparation, training, evaluation, and GUI simulation for real-time defect detection.

github.name: A-YOLOv5s-based-Steel-Surface-Defects-Detector
github.description: A computer vision project implementing the YOLOv5s model for detecting and classifying steel surface defects using the NEU-DET dataset. Includes dataset preparation, training, evaluation, and GUI simulation for real-time defect detection.

repo_candidates.abstract: The proposed steel surface defect detection model CGG-YOLO further improves the accuracy of steel surface defect detection in industrial environments.

github.description: The proposed steel surface defect detection model CGG-YOLO further improves the accuracy of steel surface defect detection in industrial environments.
